title: Angels Archosaurs
wikitext:
[]: Angels-Archosaurs             Quote Post by Midnight Door » Sat Oct 17, 2009 1:44 pm ---------The first topic is the nature of the Rebuild of Evangelion series... the Rebuild is a sequel & not a retelling of Evangelion... ---The streak of blood on the moon came from the newborn god's throat in the End of Evangelion... --- Tabris rises from his coffin on the moon & states that "The Third is still the same." (either referring to Third Impact, or Shinji ) impling he has either meet Shinji before or seen Third Impact before hand (which is not impossible considering the Influence of Sir Arthur Charles Clarke 's Childhoods End )... ---the LCL is red & all the oceans appear to be red (presumably tainted with LCL) as the Antarctic ocean may have been when it was struck by Adam's immense AT Feild... --- Yui hint's in the End of Evangelion that anyone who has both the will to live & the capeability to Individualize can pull themselves from the LCL Ocean... there for allowing the potential for the entire cycle to star again (possibly without any true begining o ending) & explaining where the souls within Guf came from (They came from the previous cycle of the Earth) ---------Whilst dinosaurs may not seem to have anything to do with the Angels in evangelion, & i'm sure Anno was not aware of dinosuar growth mechanics at the time (as theorized by Jack Horner) but he may have used a similar idea when he reinstrumentalized the angels in the Rebuild series... ----Jack horner proposed that many recongized dinosaur species were the same species though just different age groups, an example would be Dracorex hogwartsia was a young Stygimoloch spinifer which inturn was an adolescent Pachycephalosaurus wyomingensis to support his theory he point to the position of the horns / bumps on the skull of each (they are in the same location), he psostulated that the prominate dome (found in adults) & horns (Juviniles) were used to determine the ages of the animals... ---http://www.crministriesphilly.com/dracoskull03-c.jpg/dracoskull03-c-full.jpg ---http://z.about.com/d/dinosaurs/1/0/z/-/-/-/stygimoloch.jpg ---http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/6/6c/Pachycephalosaurus_skull.JPG ----Triceratops is another example... where the horns point up as juviniles & sub adults but slightly downwards as adults (juviniles also possess ornimental frill spikes that become lost as they age) ---http://johnscannella.com/images/sierraskull2_pm38.jpg ---http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/d1/Triceratops_Skeleton_Senckenberg_2.jpg ----Looking at the angels in the Anime, Manga, & Rebuild series the differences between angels with the same name may also be atributed to age differences... they may be the same species though seperate age groups... & since the same laws of biology do not apply to the angels greater feats of metamorphosis could occur that a tiny sauropod chick hatching from a soccer ball sized egg & growing into a Diplodocus hallorum --- Shamshel may have exploded in the rebuild series because it may not have formed a self-image when it was slain... ---The Ramiel in the original Anime may have been a juvenile (as were the children inside the Eva), though the individual in the Rebuild may have been a full matured individual or a seperate species... ---The differing coloration of the organism that is Bardiel could be Sexual Dimorphism, or again different age stages, though I think it is more likely that the Rebuild bardiel is a related though distinct species... --- Zeruel 's differing psychology & morphology could to be attributed to age differences, the highly more agressive nature suggests that the Rebuild Zeruel may be fully matured... ---Any difference in Kaworu 's personailty can be attributed to the fragmentation of his soul & the maturation of his Psychology... ---Eva unit one's skin color, personally I liked Evangelion Unit One more when it was black (she looked so cool!!!), but since she is described as "human" a variation in skin tone just means a varying melanin count... ---To support my theory I point to the Evangelion units... they are imperfect copies of Adam (as they do not possess an S² Engine)... tough is present in in the Mass Production Evangelion & Evangelion Unit 1 (Post-Zeruel battle)... one may argue that Eva's are incapeable of generating an S² Organ but this is disproved in the original Zeruel battles when she obtains an S² Organ from Zeruel... so it may be that Seele deliberately inhibited the Evas from developing into Seeds of Life & then into a status rivaling the First Ancestral Race ... ---Second peice of evidence: Sandalphon... in it's egg it looked like a human foetus though metamorphosized into it's Neonatal form...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 17, 2009 2:03 pm The first topic is the nature of the Rebuild of Evangelion series... the Rebuild is a sequel & not a retelling of Evangelion...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Oct 17, 2009 8:33 pm Spawn of an alien progenitor lost for billions of years trying to reclaim their rightful planet = Diapsid reptiles with teeth set in sockets and mandibular fenstration? =

[]:             Quote Post by Ryjin » Mon Oct 19, 2009 4:02 pm ow that I got a chance to fully read over what you wrote you defendantly got some interesting stuff there, but I don't think webuild is a sequel. The reason I say that is, well Anno is know for being the God-King of the Trolls when it comes to this kind of thing, the red ocean and the blood streak on the moon would seem to at first glance hints to EOE, but when you take into account the natural habits of a troll of this caliber and compare it to the rest of 1.0 you can see the whole thing was mean to mess with you and throw you off, for example notice how 1.0 starts out almost a trace job of the first episode and the 3rd (4th) angles design was the same as how it was originally then after that each got more of a face lift. In fact the whole movie only diverges a little form the show out side of introducing Lillith and Kaworu earlier and changing how Kaworu is introduced as well as the fact the 3rd angel is now the 4th. Then comes in 2.0 and then everything goes out the window, but I don't know if you have seen it so I'm not going to say anything else other then I think you may give up the sequel theory after seeing it.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Oct 19, 2009 4:14 pm Interesting take on the Angels. Not sure I agree with your argument, MidnightDoor, but it's very interesting (though I think once I actually *see* Rebuild, I can appreciate this better...).

[]:             Quote Post by Rei`s Pimp AKA lil`Von » Tue Oct 20, 2009 9:36 am OK homeboy i to am on of the supporters of the sequel theories. and i beleive you have a valid argument, and unlike ol' buddy above me i believe that watching EOE will only strengthn it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Oct 20, 2009 9:39 am the Literalist Sequel Theorists (yes we need these names to sound all academic etc.) really need to belt out some SOLID proof how going from EoE to RoE is possible and makes sense no "FAR DID IT FOR THE LULZ" plz

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Oct 20, 2009 10:36 am So i if i get the gist of the OP's theory, ve suggests that the differences between the original Angels and the Rebuild ones can be attributed to maturation? I would attribute those differences to CGI evolution and a bigger budget, myself. The main problem with this theory, like with all the other sequel-proving theories, IMHO, that it can be dismantled with a simple "Or not". We just don't have anything solid to work with regarding Rebuild's status. It might be a sequel.. or not. 


[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Oct 20, 2009 1:46 pm That and a lot of "evidence" in 1.0 was disproved in 2.0. So you know. also, not a sequel theorist, but... no "FAR DID IT FOR THE LULZ" plz
